name: The Unlit Deep
descriptionSeed: Past the city, past the harbor, the dark stops being a home and becomes a doctrine. The Unlit live here — the cult of the pure pole — and they would put out every light in the world, beginning with the ones people love. The Umbrals do not disown them, exactly. They simply do not go, and they do not talk about it, and they get very quiet if you ask. A civilization can live near a pole. Only a cult can live AT one.
encounterFlavor: The Unlit, who are gentle and reasonable and want something unspeakable; things down here that were never people; an Umbral who came to argue with them and has not come back.
questSeeds: The Unlit have taken someone from the city and the city is pretending it did not happen
Someone must go down and argue with a cult, and arguing is the only weapon that works

substrateSource.reason: Down past where light is a memory, the lattice is denser than anywhere in the Depths and nobody has explained why.
